message:
fix: resolve React hydration error #418 with date initialization

Fixed hydration mismatch caused by initializing state with Date
objects that differ between server and client render.

github-heartbeat.tsx:
- Initialize `now` as null instead of new Date()
- Set actual time after hydration in useEffect
- Guard stats calculation when now is null
- Only render EventCards when now is available

three-scene.tsx:
- Initialize hour with stable value (12) instead of new Date().getHours()
- Set actual hour after hydration in useEffect

header-icon-3d.tsx:
- Same pattern: stable initial value, update after hydration

This eliminates the React error #418 "Hydration failed because
server rendered HTML didn't match the client" that appeared in
the browser console.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
